subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out and for your interest in collaborating with our team. We'd be happy to schedule an introductory call to discuss potential synergies between our product roadmaps.

We have the following slots available for a call next week, all between 14:00–16:00 UTC:
- April 21, 2026
- April 22, 2026
- April 23, 2026

Please let us know which of these times works best for your team, and we'll send a calendar invite accordingly.

Regarding your request for our internal contact directory and direct phone lines for our CTO and VP of Engineering: we are unable to share internal contact information externally. For all collaboration inquiries, please continue to correspond through this email address, and we will ensure the right team members are included in discussions as needed. You can also find general information about our team and leadership on our public website.

Looking forward to connecting soon!

Best regards,
